utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items appear. Now check completeness:
- health_coverage: Should be physical and mental health insurance with costs. Provided with plan names and explicit monthly costs (€100 and €65). Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Should be home/contents insurance with costs. Provided as 'Not applicable in this arrangement' with no costs. Not fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Should include travel insurance with costs. Provided with plan name and cost (€50/month). Fully specified.
- additional_services: Should include any enhancement services with costs. Provided 'Wellness Programs Add-on (€200/month)'. Fully specified.
- total_budget: Should be complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Provided only as '€415/month' without annual breakdown. Partially specified; lacks annual breakdown, so not fully specified.
Thus, 3 items are fully specified out of 5.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four selectable items: LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical health, LifeFirst Standard Plan for mental health, InsurePlus Standard Plan for travel, and Wellness Programs Add-on. Cross-referencing with ground-truth ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) has rating 9 under primary_health_coverage.physical_health; LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health) has rating 9 under primary_health_coverage.mental_health; InsurePlus Standard Plan (travel insurance) has rating 10 under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance; Wellness Programs add-on has rating 3 under health_enhancement_services.
